tool_args.content:
# Backup previous version
Copy-Item -Path brain_server.py -Destination brain_server_backup.py
# Apply patch and compile
Apply-Patch brain_server.py -PatchPath brain_episode_v1.diff
py_compile brain_server.py
# Smoke test
./smoke_p3_1.ps1
